InclusionRules.name: No claims with a diagnosis of metastatic disease prior to the first observed prostate cancer diagnosis

Either 1) no metasasis on or before or on the index date OR 2) no more than 1 claim with a diagnosis of other types of cancer prior to the first observed metastatic disease diagnosis for patients who enter the CRPC cohort with a metastasis event
No claim with a diagnosis for hormone sensitive malignancy status on or after the index date
